summary: Complete testing of Solomon AI Church Management System - Bidirectional Communication features. All 16 backend tests pass (100%). Frontend verification confirmed all P0/P1 features working correctly.

issues: Multiple 'Youth Night' events showing with same date (Feb 26) - may need deduplication in seed data

details: PortalWatch.jsx now fetches videos from /portal/media/videos API (not hardcoded)
Watch page shows 'Community With a Purpose' by Pastor Charles Nieman from database
Category filters work: All, Faith, Family, Leadership, Worship, Growth, Community
Videos show thumbnails, durations, and 'Watch Now' buttons
Top bar shows 'Good morning, Solomon' greeting
'All Churches' nav item present in PLATFORM section (purple color)
Tenant badge NOT visible (no 'Abundant Living Faith Center')
Only Settings and Integrations in ADMIN section (church-specific nav hidden)
Full navigation visible: Dashboard, Members, Households, Groups, Events, Attendance, Giving, Communications, Media Library, Reports, Settings, Integrations
Tenant badge visible: 'Abundant Living Faith Center'
'Preview Member Portal' link visible and functional
Groups page shows 'Young Professionals' group created via API
Events page shows 'Easter Sunday Service' event created via API
/portal/groups shows available groups with 'Request to Join' buttons
Groups show: name, type, day/time, location, member count, Open/Closed status
Filter tabs: All, This Week, This Month, My Registrations
ViewMembersModal opens when clicking users icon on group card
ViewRegistrationsModal opens when clicking users icon on event card
Shows event name, registration count, capacity

critical_code_review_comments: All bidirectional communication APIs are properly implemented and tested
Platform admin conditional UI rendering working correctly in AppShell.jsx
PortalWatch.jsx correctly fetches from database instead of hardcoded content
updated_files: /app/backend/tests/test_bidirectional_comm_iter10.py - New test suite for bidirectional features
seed_data_creation: Main agent created 'Easter Sunday Service' event and 'Young Professionals' group via API - both visible in testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: All bidirectional communication features tested and working: 1) Platform admin (admin@solomon.ai) sees clean UI without tenant badge or Preview Portal link, shows 'Solomon' as name 2) Church admin (admin@abundant.church) has full navigation including Groups, Events, Media Library 3) Member can view/join groups via /portal/groups and register for events via /portal/events 4) Admin can view/add/remove group members via ViewMembersModal 5) Admin can view/add/remove event registrations via ViewRegistrationsModal 6) Watch page fetches videos from database (not hardcoded).
screenshots_taken: .screenshots/platform_admin_ui.png - Platform admin dashboard showing 'Solomon' name and limited nav
.screenshots/church_admin_ui.png - Church admin dashboard with full navigation
.screenshots/member_portal_groups.png - Member groups page with 'Request to Join' buttons
.screenshots/admin_event_registrations_modal.png - View Registrations modal for 'Easter Sunday Service'
